overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail on a sunny day. The character ascends a hillside path, pauses at a scenic overlook with distant mountains and water, then continues exploring the natural environment.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt forest path, swords on his back swaying slightly with each step

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest with visible wheel ruts
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
grassy slope with tall green vegetation

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail winding through a dense forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path while sunlight filters through the canopy, casting dappled shadows on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending hillside trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: large rock formations become visible along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking uphill along the winding trail, approaching a ridge with increasing elevation

entered.detail: gray boulders and rocky outcrops emerging from the hillside
tall plants with bright yellow flowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail ascends steadily through the hillside, with large rock formations and yellow flowering plants appearing along the right side. The trees on the left move closer as the path narrows while climbing.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with panoramic view of water and mountains

events.description: path opens to reveal expansive view of distant mountains and body of water
Geralt stops walking to stand and observe the scenic vista

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses at the hilltop overlook, turning to gaze at the distant mountain range and water below, taking in the panoramic view

entered.detail: clearing at the hilltop offering unobstructed views of the landscape
hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon across the water
large lake or sea visible in the distance below the hillside

segments.scene_description: The forest opens to a breathtaking viewpoint revealing a vast body of water and distant mountains. Geralt stops walking to stand on the grassy overlook, turning to admire the panoramic vista before him.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail continuing along the ridge

events.description: Geralt resumes walking along the trail away from the viewpoint
brief passage through darker shadowed area before returning to sunlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues his journey along the hillside path, moving away from the overlook and back into the tree line

entered.detail: dense green shrubbery with thin branches

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the viewpoint and resumes walking along the dirt trail, re-entering the denser forest area. The path continues along the hillside, passing large bushes and patches of shadow before returning to sunlit areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that opens into a wide mountain vista before returning to the wooded hillside. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail where sunlight filters through a canopy of tall pine trees to cast dappled shadows. As the path ascends steadily, the environment shifts to include large rock formations and yellow flowering plants along the right side while the trees crowd closer on the left. The forest then opens abruptly into a breathtaking grassy overlook, where Geralt pauses to admire a panoramic view of a vast body of water and distant mountains. Finally, the camera follows him as he leaves the viewpoint and re-enters the denser forest, passing through patches of shadow and large bushes along the continuing hillside trail.
